news.headline: uniQure CEO sells 21,082 shares after option exercise under 10b5-1 plan
news.summary: CEO Matthew Kapusta exercised options at $19.39 and sold the resulting 21,082 ordinary shares at roughly $45-$46 under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Similar 10b5-1 exercises/sales were also reported for the CMO and a director around the same time.

news.headline: uniQure (QURE) Now Trades Above Golden Cross: Time to Buy?
news.summary: QURE's 50-day moving average crossed above its 200-day moving average, a bullish 'golden cross' technical signal, after the stock gained roughly 72% over the prior four weeks. Zacks flagged the technical setup as potentially attractive but noted the stock still carries a Hold rank pending fundamental catalysts.

news.headline: uniQure Announces Closing of Upsized Public Offering and Full Exercise by Underwriters of Option to Purchase Additional Shares
news.summary: uniQure closed its upsized underwritten offering of ordinary shares at $45.50 per share, raising approximately $259 million in gross proceeds including the underwriters' full option exercise. Proceeds are earmarked to fund the planned AMT-130 BLA submission and broader pipeline development.

news.headline: uniQure Announces Preliminary Data on the First Cohort in the Phase I/IIa Clinical Trial of AMT-260 in Refractory Mesial Temporal Lobe Epilepsy
news.summary: Six-month follow-up data on the first, low-dose AMT-260 cohort (six patients) showed the therapy was generally well tolerated with no serious adverse events, and three of six patients had meaningful reductions (79%-100%) in disabling seizures. Enrollment in the higher-dose cohort is ongoing.

news.headline: Barclays, Cantor Fitzgerald and Leerink sharply raise uniQure price targets after FDA reversal
news.summary: Following the FDA's reversal on the AMT-130 filing pathway, Barclays upgraded QURE to Overweight with a $65 target, Cantor Fitzgerald upgraded to Overweight at $61, and Leerink raised its target to $70 (from $36); H.C. Wainwright and Mizuho also lifted targets to $80 and $68 respectively. The wave of upgrades followed the stock's roughly 78% single-day surge.

news.headline: uniQure Announces Plan for BLA Submission for AMT-130 in Huntington's Disease
news.summary: The FDA informed uniQure during a Type B meeting that the ~3-year Phase I/II data (75% slowing of cUHDRS progression vs. external control, p=0.003) can serve as the primary basis for a BLA seeking accelerated approval, reversing its earlier stance requiring a new randomized/sham-controlled trial. uniQure plans to submit the BLA in Q3 2026; shares surged about 78% on the news.

catalysts.label: AMT-130 BLA submission (US)
catalysts.detail: uniQure plans to submit a Biologics License Application to the FDA seeking accelerated approval of AMT-130 for Huntington's disease, based on ~3-year Phase I/II data accepted by the FDA as the primary efficacy basis.

catalysts.label: UK MHRA MAA filing for AMT-130
catalysts.detail: Following a successful pre-submission meeting, uniQure plans to file a Marketing Authorization Application with the UK MHRA for AMT-130 in Huntington's disease.

catalysts.label: 4-year AMT-130 data analysis
catalysts.detail: uniQure expects to complete a 4-year analysis of the Phase I/II AMT-130 data, following FDA feedback on the statistical analysis plan discussed at the Type B meeting.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings report
catalysts.detail: uniQure is expected to report second-quarter 2026 financial results and provide a pipeline/regulatory update; date is an analyst/data-provider estimate (aggregators list July 28) and has not yet been formally confirmed by the company.

catalysts.label: AMT-260 higher-dose cohort enrollment completion
catalysts.detail: Enrollment in the second, higher-dose (3x10^12 gc/mL) AMT-260 cohort of six refractory mesial temporal lobe epilepsy patients is expected to complete around mid-2026.

catalysts.label: AMT-260 updated data (both cohorts)
catalysts.detail: uniQure expects to present updated efficacy/safety results from both the low- and higher-dose AMT-260 cohorts in refractory mesial temporal lobe epilepsy.

catalysts.label: Potential FDA accelerated approval decision for AMT-130
catalysts.detail: If the BLA is submitted in Q3 2026 and granted priority review, a potential FDA approval decision could arrive around mid-2027; timing not yet company-confirmed.

catalysts.label: Additional international regulatory updates
catalysts.detail: uniQure is pursuing further regulatory pathways for AMT-130 in additional international markets beyond the US and UK, with updates expected in the second half of 2026.

pulse: uniQure shares exploded roughly 70-80% in mid-June 2026 after the FDA reversed course and agreed that ~3-year Phase I/II data on AMT-130 can support an accelerated-approval BLA in Huntington's disease, triggering a wave of analyst upgrades (targets up to $80) and enabling a $259M capital raise to fund the filing. Since early July the stock has cooled into a consolidation/technical-strength phase (golden cross, routine insider 10b5-1 sales) with no major fresh catalysts, as the market awaits the Q2 2026 earnings update (~July 28) and the actual Q3 2026 BLA and UK MHRA filings. Sentiment is bullish (Strong Buy consensus, ~$57-65 average target) but hinges on execution of the BLA submission and eventual FDA review outcome.
